description: Run approved baseline models against a tabular dataset with a standard artifact contract.

required_inputs.name: dataset_name
required_inputs.description: Stable dataset identifier for operator and reporting use.

required_inputs.name: train_uri
required_inputs.description: Resolved URI for the training split.

required_inputs.name: test_uri
required_inputs.description: Resolved URI for the test or holdout split.

required_inputs.name: target_column
required_inputs.description: Name of the supervised target column.
